message:
test(cli): Add comprehensive tests for stale and privacy commands

Improve test coverage for CLI commands:

- stale command: Added tests for invalid parameters, human-readable
  output, scope filtering, and high-score recommendation case.
  Coverage improved from 67% to 100%.

- privacy command: Added tests for invalid days validation, missing
  agent errors, human-readable output for all actions, and deprecated
  llm config migration. Coverage improved from 71% to 91%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
